title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at ICICI Lombard International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at ICICI Lombard International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
ICICI Lombard International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Nagpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About ICICI Lombard International Enterprises:
ICICI Lombard International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Lombard International Enterprises!
